ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product in ounces */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "product_manual" TEXT /* URL or file path of the product manual */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was first added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the product record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_specs" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the specification belongs to */,
  "spec_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification (e.g., Mono Line Capacity, Bearings) */,
  "spec_value" TEXT /* Value of the specification */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the specification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the specification was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_specs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the inventory entry belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the inventory */,
  "last_stock_check" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold for automatic reorder notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the sale belongs to */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Order number */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales representative, product manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the product */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)
